title: Week Column as Deadline
excerpt: We would love to see the ability to add a Deadline option to the Week column. We have many projects without a specific date due over Week.

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love to see the ability to add a Deadline option to the Week column. We have many projects without a specific date due over Week.

posts.author: Stefan (SJN)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please! +1 from me on this request.
